example_tasks: Schedule phone interview with product manager candidate
Follow up with client via phone regarding outstanding invoice
Call bank to authorize international wire transfer
Set up conference call with the regional marketing team
Return missed call from the medical clinic
Call internet service provider to negotiate monthly rate
Conduct initial phone screen for frontend developer
Call support to resolve cloud database hosting issue
Ring supplier to verify parts delivery date
Contact insurance agent to update policy details
poor_matches: Read chapter 4 of system design book
reasoning: The icon clearly depicts a ringing or alerting telephone handset. This is a universally understood metaphor for voice calls and urgent verbal communication, making it highly effective for filtering call-related tasks in a busy list.
